title: Infinity TNT
description: Infinite TNT dispenser. Easily replace old fashioned TNT dupers.
body:
TNT dupers made very easy.

Place a dispenser facing downwards with an item frame holding TNT on top of it.

Whenever the dispenser gets powered by redstone, it will dispense TNT. Real simple.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jb88ng3g/images/c984d508461a01688d12c0bf65f7eb9a9dd6ea9b.png)

See [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
